name: Nscale

when_to_use: AI-native GPU infrastructure for LLM training in Europe
Full-stack GPU cloud: clusters, storage, and inference serving
Sustainable AI compute with European data residency
Large-scale model training on H100 clusters for European teams

pros: Full-stack from infra to model serving
review.verdict: Promising European AI cloud with sovereignty angle, but pricing and track record still unproven.
review.best_for: European AI teams needing GPU infrastructure with EU data residency and sovereignty
review.not_for: Teams outside Europe or those needing mature managed ML tooling today

lock_in.reason: GPU cloud with standard CUDA stack
